chapter_title.en: Among the Concise Words of the Messenger of Allah (peace Be Upon him)

text:
5859 - وَ رَوَى اَلْحَسَنُ بْنُ عَلِيِّ بْنِ فَضَّالٍ عَنِ اَلْحَسَنِ بْنِ اَلْجَهْمِ عَنِ اَلْفُضَيْلِ بْنِ يَسَارٍ قَالَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ جَعْفَرُ بْنُ مُحَمَّدٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ :
"مَا ضَعُفَ بَدَنٌ عَمَّا قَوِيَتْ عَلَيْهِ اَلنِّيَّةُ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.5859 - Al-Hasan ibn Ali ibn Faddal narrated from Al-Hasan ibn Al-Jahm, from Al-Fudayl ibn Yasar, who said that Abu Abdullah Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"The body does not become weak in pursuing what the intention has been strengthened for."
